title: Founder's Associate
requirements_met: Entrepreneurial mindset with comfort in fast-moving environments: 6 years as first employee scaling Minima seed to Series A
Clear communication abilities: PR, content, investor updates
Support high-stakes projects incl. fundraising and due diligence: supported $2.5m seed round, pitch decks, investor inquiries, $6.5m Series A support
Foster cross-departmental alignment: coordinated across community, ops, marketing workstreams
gaps: Role requires 1+ years in investment banking, consulting or PE with strong financial modeling skills - Ryan has fundraising support experience but no IB/consulting/PE background or formal financial-modeling track record
preferred_met: Familiarity with legal/compliance basics for scaling companies: exposure via fundraising support and early-stage ops
Comfort partnering directly with CEO: 6 years working directly with founders

experience_fit.calculation: Founder-facing generalist fit, but role is finance-heavy (financial models, due diligence) which is adjacent not core for Ryan = 12/15

industry_match.calculation: STINT is an AI hospitality staffing platform - genuine AI company = 15

location_match.calculation: London Camden 5 days/week in-office; user is open to in-person but 5d/wk from Cambridge is the most demanding mode = 0 (within-spec but full commute load). Conservatively scored low to reflect commute intensity

notes: STINT: AI-driven hospitality staffing platform. Founder's Associate is finance-leaning (financial modeling, fundraising, due diligence) and explicitly seeks 1+ yr IB/consulting/PE - the financial-modeling requirement is Ryan's biggest gap. 5d/wk Camden office is the most commute-intensive of the set from Cambridge.
